_human_review.notes: US Stage B generated/autolabeled labels were reconciled by Codex for internal benchmark cleanup; project-owner approval is still required before promotion-ready status.

_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: US Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: US Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after narrowed SA/US Stage B detector precision fixes

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Confidential, non-binding Term Sheet — Proposed acquisition of Helion Care Insights, Inc. (“Helion”) by Norvera Health Bancorp, Inc. (“Norvera”), a U.S. reporting issuer listed on a U.S. national securities exchange.
Structure and consideration: All-cash reverse triangular merger at $8.50 per Helion share; estimated equity value ~$212,000,000; subject to customary working-capital and debt-like adjustments.
Financing: Cash on hand and a committed bridge facility from Redfield Commercial Bank, N.A. (commitment letter executed and deliverable at signing); no financing condition to close.

Materiality standard (issuer-relative): For purposes of Rule 10b‑5 and internal disclosure controls, items reasonably expected to impact >5% of Norvera’s consolidated revenue or quarterly EPS, or to alter previously issued guidance, are presumptively material; immaterial operational details may be shared internally on a need-to-know basis.

Governance and approvals: Subject to approval by both Boards of Directors and receipt of required healthcare, insurance, and banking regulatory notices/clearances; pre-merger antitrust notifications under applicable U.S. law will be filed promptly after signing.

Definitive agreement conditions: Confirmatory diligence; absence of a Company Material Adverse Effect; customary representations and warranties; covenants re interim operations; closing targeted within 90–120 days post-signing.

No-shop and fiduciary out: Helion will agree to a no-shop with customary fiduciary out and matching rights; termination fee equal to 2.5% of equity value payable upon acceptance of a Superior Proposal or willful breach.

Non-issuer operational note (benign): Helion’s planned office relocation in August 2026 is a landlord matter and, standing alone, is not expected to be material to Norvera or to alter previously issued guidance.
quarterly blackout from June 15 through July 25
Only essential personnel will be wall-crossed and tracked
no reference to this term sheet prior to public dissemination
no one-on-one calls with research analysts prior to announcement
shall not trade in Norvera or Helion securities
